mapper.select: SELECT challenge_id, title, description, goal_type, goal_count, period_days, badge_emoji, created_at FROM challenges ORDER BY goal_count ASC, challenge_id ASC
mapper.sql: SELECT uc.user_challenge_id, uc.user_id, uc.challenge_id, uc.status, uc.progress, uc.joined_at, uc.completed_at, c.title, c.description, c.goal_count, c.badge_emoji FROM user_challenges uc JOIN challenges c ON uc.challenge_id = c.challenge_id
mapper.select: WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY (uc.status = 'COMPLETED'), uc.joined_at DESC
WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 'ONGOING' AND c.goal_type = #{goalType}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_challenges SET progress = progress + 1 WHERE user_challenge_id = #{userChallengeId}
UPDATE user_challenges SET status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at = NOW() WHERE user_challenge_id = #{userChallengeId} AND status = 'ONGOING'
